violations.text: Door gasket of walk-in cooler #1 observed in poor repair, splitting away from the door. Gasket is to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024

The ceiling tiles in the oven room are in poor repair, heavily stained. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Ceiling tiles are being replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024
